name: Callahan
content:
Where the hell is Callahan?
I was hiking down the highway near Callahan one evening, wearing a bright turquoise skirt, when a man hauling a gargantuan engine block in the opposite direction stopped to ask if I needed directions. A different lady driving to Weaverville offered me a ride, cutting out the last couple miles of my 15 mile evening hike (I was catching up to some friends that had left earlier that day). I ran into the first guy while I was in town the next morning, and we exchanged a quick hello. Anyhow, my point is, people are really nice around here.
